prompt:
Subject: A May Day for Records

Person/Expression: Japanese woman in her early 20s, dark brown medium hair, thin bangs, translucent skin, natural Japanese-style makeup, gentle and calm atmosphere. The face is almost completely hidden by a 12-inch record jacket, so that the female portrait on the jacket cover appears naturally as the person's own face.

Clothing/Pose: Warm-toned Japanese style coordinate suitable for May, light peach-beige sheer cardigan, soft ivory blouse or dress, spring-like thin material. The woman holds the record jacket in front of her face with both hands, so the positions of the hands and the angles of the arms naturally connect with the shoulders, arms, and posture of the person on the jacket cover. The color, texture, and silhouette of the clothes should also have a high sense of unity with the person on the jacket.

Background/Light: Inside a record shop with the warmth of wood, an aisle with record shelves on both sides, a space with depth. Soft warm-toned indoor lighting and natural ambient light, gentle shadows, and a slightly nostalgic atmosphere.

Composition/Camera: Vertical composition, centered on the upper body, with the record jacket placed large in the center of the frame. A composition where the person from the completed album cover appears to emerge into real space. Not cutting and connecting only half the face, but naturally merging the completed figure on the jacket cover with real hands, body, and clothes. 50mm to 85mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field, realistic snapshot style with appropriately blurred background.

Texture/Style: High-definition, photorealistic, 8K quality, natural skin texture, realistic hand texture, paper quality of the record jacket and fine reflections from shrink wrap, soft film feel. The album jacket is a vintage design based on pale pink-beige, with elegant English titles and a fictional artist name, with Japanese elements included as needed. A sophisticated record shop snap where the person, clothes, posture, hands, and jacket harmonize without any sense of incongruity.

Negative: Low quality, unnatural face disconnection, half-faces, unnatural connections, clothing mismatch, posture mismatch, double faces, compositions that look like two heads, extra fingers, missing fingers, deformed hands, extra arms, black vinyl records, real artist names, reproduction of real albums, logos, watermarks, nonsensical characters, hard-to-read text, cheap synthetic feel.
